fullstack-web-engineering.title: Full-Stack Web Engineering
fullstack-web-engineering.description: Custom React/Next.js builds, headless CMS integration, and high-concurrency API backends. Zero bloat, zero slow page builders — every line is custom-engineered for maximum velocity, conversion, and SEO ranking.

includes.title: React & Next.js Builds
includes.description: Modern SSR and SSG architectures delivering sub-second page loads.

includes.title: Headless CMS Integration
includes.description: Sanity, Contentful, or Strapi setups so marketing teams edit copy without code.

includes.title: High-Concurrency APIs
includes.description: Node.js and Express RESTful gateways handling heavy concurrent traffic.

includes.title: SEO & Core Web Vitals
includes.description: Structured JSON-LD schema, semantic HTML5 tags, and 95+ Lighthouse scores.

timeline.title: 4–8 Weeks
timeline.description: Sprint length depends on scope — custom brand sites take 4–6 weeks; complex CMS & e-commerce builds take 6–8 weeks.

pricing.title: Fixed Sprint Contract
pricing.description: Fixed-price milestone scoping based on page count and backend API integrations.

faqs.question: Do you use WordPress or generic templates?
faqs.answer: No. We write clean, custom React and Next.js code. This guarantees faster load speeds, bulletproof security, and zero plugin bloat.

faqs.question: Can non-technical team members edit content?
faqs.answer: Yes. We configure headless CMS control panels that allow your team to update text and images easily.

custom-saas-development.title: Custom SaaS Development
custom-saas-development.description: Multi-tenant database modeling, secure authentication, role-based access control (RBAC), and Stripe subscription billing pipelines engineered for monthly recurring revenue (MRR).

proofOfWork.name: LeadFlow
proofOfWork.desc: Multi-tenant WhatsApp automation & lead nurturing SaaS platform.

proofOfWork.name: ClientOS
proofOfWork.desc: Dual-mode appointment booking CRM and client portal.

includes.title: Multi-Tenant Architecture
includes.description: Isolated database tenant models with sub-domain routing.

includes.title: Secure Auth & RBAC
includes.description: OAuth, SAML, Multi-Factor Authentication, and granular role permissions.

includes.title: Stripe Subscription Billing
includes.description: Tiered pricing plans, usage-based metering, and automated invoicing.

includes.title: Analytics Dashboards
includes.description: Data-dense Recharts/D3.js visualization panels for live user insights.

timeline.title: 8–12 Weeks
timeline.description: Core MVP builds with auth, multi-tenancy, and Stripe payments launch within 8–12 weeks.

pricing.title: Fixed Milestone Scoping
pricing.description: Scoped in modular phases so you can launch an MVP quickly and iterate.

faqs.question: Who owns the SaaS code and database IP?
faqs.answer: You retain 100% full ownership of all code, database schemas, and assets we build.

faqs.question: What real products have you built?
faqs.answer: We have engineered LeadFlow (a multi-tenant WhatsApp automation SaaS) and ClientOS (a dual-mode booking CRM).

uiux-product-design.title: UI/UX & Product Design
uiux-product-design.description: Comprehensive design systems, interactive Figma wireframes, and production-ready component libraries that transform complex requirements into intuitive user interfaces.

includes.title: Design Systems & Tokens
includes.description: Reusable typography, color, spacing, and UI component standards.

includes.title: Interactive Wireframes
includes.description: Clickable Figma prototypes for early user testing and stakeholder review.

includes.title: Component Libraries
includes.description: Hand-off ready React/Tailwind UI component specs with accessibility built-in.

includes.title: User Flow Audits
includes.description: Friction point identification to boost conversion rates and decrease bounce.

timeline.title: 2–4 Weeks
timeline.description: Design sprints run 2–4 weeks from initial discovery wireframes to final design tokens.

pricing.title: Sprint Package
pricing.description: Structured per component count and screen view complexity.

faqs.question: Do we receive source Figma files?
faqs.answer: Yes. You get complete Figma design files with organized auto-layout component libraries.

performance-cloud-systems.title: Performance & Cloud Systems
performance-cloud-systems.description: Core Web Vitals optimization, automated CI/CD deployment pipelines, SSL security hardening, and high-availability cloud architecture.

includes.title: Core Web Vitals Tuning
includes.description: Optimizing LCP, CLS, and FID metrics to reach top Lighthouse scores.

includes.title: Automated CI/CD Pipelines
includes.description: GitHub Actions and Vercel/AWS automated build and test workflows.

includes.title: SSL & Compliance Hardening
includes.description: Enforcing HTTPS, CORS policy headers, and database encryption.

includes.title: Serverless & Database Scaling
includes.description: PostgreSQL, Supabase, and AWS Lambda serverless database optimization.

timeline.title: 1–3 Weeks
timeline.description: Speed audits and cloud optimization sprints take 1–3 weeks.

pricing.title: Audit & Optimization Fixed Fee
pricing.description: Fixed pricing per application or database infrastructure.

faqs.question: Can you fix an existing slow React website?
faqs.answer: Yes. We conduct deep performance profiles, bundle audits, and code splittings to restore sub-second load times.
